# tg_node_service (Resource)

Manage an L4 service on a node (V2). Requires the node to have been upgraded to V2 services config — see `tg_node_services_v2_upgrade`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tg_node_service" "https_forwarder" {
  node_id  = "d70e7d73-2a1c-4388-bbb1-08ca2fd39f48"
  name     = "https-forwarder"
  protocol = "tcp"
  host     = "10.20.30.40"
  port     = 443
  enabled  = true

  source_interface = "ens192"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host` (String) Destination host.
- `name` (String) Service name.
- `node_id` (String) Node UID that owns this service.
- `port` (Number) Destination port (1-65535).
- `protocol` (String) Protocol. One of: udp, tcp, tftp, ftp, rdp, vnc, ssh.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the service is enabled.
- `source_interface` (String) NIC used for the upstream connection. V2-only.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `service_id` (String) Service unique ID. Computed after create.
